user_task_description: Release the governance workbook without renaming or deleting its live sheets.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Restore the sheet order to Governance, Dashboard, and Archive; keep Archive hidden; repair the Dashboard formulas; convert the Governance range to a formal table named GovernanceMetrics; freeze the Dashboard header row; and add the release comment on the Dashboard title cell.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change
